texto: It is only when we go outside that comfort zone, and subject ourselves to the discomfort of considering thoughts we don’t agree with, that we can make an informed judgment on any matter.
autor: Metro Nashville Police Chief Steve Anderson
explicacao: Citação de Metro Nashville Police Chief Steve Anderson sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “It is only when we go outside that comfort zone, and subject ourselves to the discomfort of consi…” articula motivacao, inspirational-attitude, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
